message:
test(robot): add unit tests for schema generation module

Tests for parseJSONTag, generateDescription, typeToSchema (primitives,
slices, maps, pointers, embedded structs, omitempty/required, unexported
fields, json:"-"), generateSchema metadata/JSON validity, GetSchema for
single/all/unknown types, getSchemaTypes, and comprehensive validation
that all SchemaCommand entries generate valid JSON schemas.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
